name: local-prompt-firewall
description: Local-first PII protection before web LLM prompts are sent.

scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=@local-prompt-firewall/core && npm run build --workspace=@local-prompt-firewall/chrome-extension
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace=@local-prompt-firewall/core && npm run typecheck --workspace=@local-prompt-firewall/chrome-extension
